prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年厦门大学在天津市综合类最低录取位次分别为约3540名、3459名、3797名、6258名、6207名。2021–2023年位次稳定在3500–3800名区间，2024年大幅后移至6258名（扩招+选科调整），2025年基本持平于6207名，近两年基准位次约6200名附近；厦门大学在天津市综合类招生计划：2021–2023年均为53人，2024年增至59人，2025年略降至58人；2026年计划50人，较2025年减少8人（缩招约13.8%）。缩招意味着投放名额减少，在考生规模扩大的背景下，竞争压力有所上升。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 厦门大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第25名，近年稳定在前25名左右，属于国内顶尖高校梯队；2026年高考周期声誉评价为明显负面，主要涉及校园安全（盗摄现象）、学校管理回应及录取断档信号；抖音热度总排名第5（高热），短视频曝光量大，报考关注度较高；历史投档异常信号显示该校自2017年以来招生情况持续恶化，高分段和低分段均出现下滑，在中九高校中排名下降；第五轮学科评估中，厦门大学拥有化学A+、海洋科学A+、生物学A+、统计学A+、工商管理A、应用经济学A、教育学A、生态学A等14个A-及以上学科，学科实力雄厚，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度高热推荐，法学分化观望，会计/财务/审计推荐，生化环材明显劝退；天津市2021–2025年考生总数持续增长（54025→71938），2026年预估约82000人，较2025年增加约14%，竞争加剧；省控线（本科批）2021–2025年从463分升至476分，呈缓慢上升趋势；厦门大学位于福建省厦门市，与天津市无地域邻近优势；该校在天津招生占比约0.5%–0.7%（2025年全国总招生约3581人中天津56人），属跨省招生，无本地倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次约6207名、2026年计划缩招约13.8%（按供需弹性计算使位次前移）、天津市考生总数增加约14%（竞争加剧使位次后移）、声誉偏负面（可能抑制部分报考热情）以及抖音高热（关注度高）等多重因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年有所前移，预测最低位次约5743名，区间5243–6243名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 法学（思明校区）
- 统计学类（经济统计学、统计学、数据科学）
- 会计学（会计、财务、审计）
- 经济学类（金融学、财政学等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、网络空间安全、人工智能、软件工程）
- 电子信息类（电子信息工程、集成电路等）
- 数学类（数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学、统计学）
- 新闻传播学类
- 外国语言文学类。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 化学类（化学、能源化学等）
- 工科试验班（航空航天与智能制造）
- 工商管理类（人力资源管理、工商管理、市场营销）
- 社会学类。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约5743名，区间5243–6243名。位次在区间下限（5243名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（法学、统计学类、会计学、经济学类）；位次在5743名附近建议以二档为主（计算机类、电子信息类、数学类），兼顾一档冲刺；位次在区间上限（6243名附近）建议以三档保底（化学类、工科试验班、工商管理类），同时争取二档中位次要求较低的专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Xiamen University in Tianjin's comprehensive category were approximately 3540, 3459, 3797, 6258, and 6207 respectively. Rankings were stable in the 3500–3800 range from 2021 to 2023, but dropped significantly to 6258 in 2024 (due to enrollment expansion and subject selection adjustments), and remained roughly stable at 6207 in 2025, with a recent baseline around 6200. The enrollment plan for Xiamen University in Tianjin's comprehensive category: 53 students each year from 2021 to 2023, increased to 59 in 2024, slightly decreased to 58 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 50 students, a reduction of 8 students (approximately 13.8% decrease) compared to 2025. The enrollment reduction means fewer slots available, and with an expanding candidate pool, competition pressure has increased.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xiamen University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; it ranks 25th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings main list, and has been stable around the top 25 in recent years, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is clearly negative, mainly involving campus safety (voyeurism incidents), school management responses, and admission cutoff signals. It ranks 5th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with high short video exposure and significant application attention. Historical admission anomaly signals indicate that the university's enrollment situation has been continuously deteriorating since 2017, with declines in both high and low score segments, and a drop in ranking among the 'Middle Nine' universities. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Xiamen University has 14 A- or above disciplines, including A+ in Chemistry, Marine Science, Biology, and Statistics, A in Business Administration, Applied Economics, Education, and Ecology, demonstrating strong disciplinary strength and strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended by social heat; Law is divided with a wait-and-see attitude; Accounting/Finance/Auditing are recommended; Chemistry, Biology, Environment, and Materials are clearly discouraged. The total number of candidates in Tianjin from 2021 to 2025 has been continuously increasing (54025→71938), with an estimated 82000 in 2026, an increase of about 14% compared to 2025, intensifying competition. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) has slowly risen from 463 to 476 points from 2021 to 2025. Xiamen University is located in Xiamen, Fujian Province, with no geographical proximity advantage to Tianjin. The university's enrollment proportion in Tianjin is about 0.5%–0.7% (56 out of approximately 3581 total national enrollment in 2025), which is cross-provincial enrollment with no local preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of about 6207, the 2026 enrollment plan reduction of about 13.8% (which, based on supply-demand elasticity, would move the ranking forward), the increase in Tianjin candidate total by about 14% (intensifying competition, moving the ranking backward), the negative reputation (which may suppress some application enthusiasm), and high Douyin heat (high attention), it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will move forward compared to 2025, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 5743, and a range of 5243–6243.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Law (Siming Campus)
- Statistics (Economic Statistics, Statistics, Data Science)
- Accounting (Accounting, Finance, Auditing)
- Economics (Finance, Public Finance, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Cyberspace Security, Artificial Intelligence, Software Engineering)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Engineering, Integrated Circuits, etc.)
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Statistics)
- Journalism and Communication
- Foreign Languages and Literature
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Chemistry (Chemistry, Energy Chemistry, etc.)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Aerospace and Intelligent Manufacturing)
- Business Administration (Human Resource Management, Business Administration, Marketing)
- Sociology
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking around 5743, range 5243–6243. Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the range (within 5243) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Law, Statistics, Accounting, Economics); those around 5743 are advised to mainly target Tier 2 (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Mathematics) while also attempting Tier 1; those near the upper end of the range (around 6243) are advised to use Tier 3 as a safety net (Chemistry, Engineering Pilot Class, Business Administration) while also striving for Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements.
